verdicts.reason: Template content rendered via createElement + textContent per plan's safe-render requirement. All user-field interpolations in updatePreview wrap through esc(). No new innerHTML-with-user-data surfaces.

Drawer follows existing Reply-Draft / Drafts pattern. Confirmation row implements WILL CHANGE / WILL CLEAR / WILL KEEP three-section disclosure matching Reply Draft Auto-Fill precedent. Mutual exclusion wired for all 5 drawers.
ai-prompt-content updated with Template Library section. aria-label on #tmpl-btn. All 12 template items self-documenting via label + desc.

12 pre-built templates across 4 categories (Personnel, Administrative, Operations, Policy & Instructions) directly address the common need to start from a known-correct format rather than a blank form.
Domain-specific templates reinforce naval-scribe's identity as a specialized correspondence tool. Per utility-flagship exemption.
aria-label at HTML layer, textContent for template rendering, esc() for user-field interpolations, WILL CHANGE/CLEAR/KEEP disclosure, AI prompt updated — all documented naval-scribe lessons followed.
